Client_Init.usage:
import { PachcaClient } from "@pachca/sdk"

const client = new PachcaClient("YOUR_TOKEN")

TaskOperations_getTask.output: Task({ id: number, title: string, isDone?: boolean })

TaskOperations_updateTask.usage:
const request: TaskUpdateRequest = { task: { title: "example", isDone: true } }
const response = client.tasks.updateTask(123, 123, request)
TaskOperations_updateTask.output: Task({ id: number, title: string, isDone?: boolean })
